ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ad on the social media platform */,
  "html" TEXT /* HTML content of the ad */,
  "political" INTEGER /* Whether the ad is political (1) or not (0) */,
  "not_political" INTEGER /* Whether the ad is non-political (1) or not (0) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the ad */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the ad */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image of the ad */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ad was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ad was last updated */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the ad */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign */,
  "creative_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the creative content of the ad */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ad started running */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ad stopped running */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the ad */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency cap for the ad */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the ad is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_images_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_targeting" (
  "targeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the targeting option belongs to */,
  "targeting_options" TEXT /* Targeting options (e.g., location, interests) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Targeting based on geographic location */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Targeting based on age range */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Targeting based on gender */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Targeting based on interests */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Targeting based on user behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_targeting_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ad (e.g., active, paused) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_status_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_status_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the performance metric belongs to */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the ad */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the ad */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) for the ad */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the ad */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who saw the ad */,
  "video_views" INTEGER /* Number of video views for the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  "conversion_value" REAL /* Value of conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the engagement metric belongs to */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the ad */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the ad */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the ad */,
  "reactions" INTEGER /* Number of reactions (e.g., likes, loves, angry) for the ad */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the ad */,
  "engagement_value" REAL /* Value of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_engagement_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the platform */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact for the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact for the advertiser */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact for the advertiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_entities_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the page belongs to */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of the page (e.g., business, personal) */,
  "page_description" TEXT /* Description of the page */,
  "page_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the page's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lower_pages" (
  "lower_page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lower-level page */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the lower-level page belongs to */,
  "lower_page_name" TEXT /* Name of the lower-level page */,
  "lower_page_url" TEXT /* URL of the lower-level page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of the lower-level page (e.g., business, personal) */,
  "page_description" TEXT /* Description of the lower-level page */,
  "page_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the lower-level page's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lower_page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lower_pages_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targetings" (
  "targeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the targeting option belongs to */,
  "targeting_option" TEXT /* Targeting option */,
  "targeting_description" TEXT /* Description of the targeting option */,
  "targeting_type" TEXT /* Type of the targeting option (e.g., demographic, interest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targetings_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paid_for_by" (
  "paid_for_by_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paid_for_by entry */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the paid_for_by entry belongs to */,
  "paid_for_by_name" TEXT /* Name of who paid for the ad */,
  "paid_for_by_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about who paid for the ad */,
  "paid_for_by_description" TEXT /* Description of who paid for the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paid_for_by_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paid_for_by_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targetedness" (
  "targetedness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targetedness metric */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the targetedness metric belongs to */,
  "targetedness_score" REAL /* Targetedness score */,
  "targetedness_description" TEXT /* Description of the targetedness metric */,
  "targetedness_type" TEXT /* Type of the targetedness metric (e.g., demographic, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targetedness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targetedness_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listbuilding_fundraising_proba" (
  "listbuilding_fundraising_proba_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listbuilding and fundraising probability metric */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the listbuilding and fundraising probability metric belongs to */,
  "listbuilding_proba" REAL /* Listbuilding probability */,
  "fundraising_proba" REAL /* Fundraising probability */,
  "listbuilding_description" TEXT /* Description of the listbuilding probability */,
  "fundraising_description" TEXT /* Description of the fundraising probability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listbuilding_fundraising_proba_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listbuilding_fundraising_proba_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)
